# External References

`external/` contains pinned outside materials, specifications, references,
upstream snapshots, and license notes that need explicit separation from
Eureka-owned semantics.

`external/` must not contain generated site output, runtime fixtures, eval
fixtures, user caches, live API caches, local indexes, private user data, or
downloaded executable mirrors unless a future rights and security policy allows
them explicitly.

Bootstrap starts with no vendored runtime or connector logic.
